title: Multi-Brand UI + Clean Production Build

validate_brand_config.note: warnings are all missing address/phone/gbp_place_id for bakudan active locations

fixes_applied: toast/ingest.ts: ToastSalesData extends Record<string, unknown>, replaced document.querySelector with typed accessor
source-inventory.ts: added PLANNED to SourceClass union type
business-reasoning-engine.ts: added 'marketing' to BusinessDimension union type
evidence-store.ts: added isEvidenceImmutable + verifyRunIntegrity to EvidenceStore interface
executive-intelligence-orchestrator.ts: added objectiveRunId to all persistEvidence calls, fixed DecisionMatrix field access
jarvis-core.ts: fixed observability stats property access to match getObservabilityStats return type
googleSheetReporter.ts: added explicit sheet type annotation to map callback
calendar-connector.ts: added typed callback parameters for googleapis list/map
drive-connector.ts: added typed callback parameter for googleapis map
seo.ts: fixed null vs string type for location_id, added undefined coalescing for completed_at
typescript_build.googleapis_fix: Removed corrupted/truncated node_modules/googleapis/build/src/apis/analyticsdata/v1alpha.d.ts (590 lines, mid-comment). skipLibCheck: true in tsconfig.json was insufficient to prevent parse errors on truncated .d.ts files.

known_limitations: Bakudan active locations all have needs_config for address/phone/gbp_place_id — real data needed
Google connectors (GSC/GBP/GA4) all show missing_credentials until env vars are set
SEO agent PM2 scripts point to individual agent .js files that need to exist (Phase 7 scope)
SEO orchestrator script SEO/shared/base/seo-orchestrator.js needs to be created (Phase 7 scope)
Dashboard brand switcher is API-driven (GET /api/seo/brands + /brands/:brandId/dashboard) — frontend UI not yet built
PM2 list proof requires actual running processes — build config only
next_step: Phase 6.7: Create stub SEO agent entry-point scripts + orchestrator.js to make pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs fully functional. Then Phase 7: connect real Google API credentials for Bakudan.
